title: SPY Shows Unusual Options Activity Ahead of Key Economic Data - Here's What Our Quant Model Detected
author: henryzhangpku
selftext:
🚨 Rare signal just triggered on SPY that historically precedes 5%+ moves within 2 weeks

Our proprietary quant model V3 flagged three converging indicators that suggest heightened volatility ahead:

• Put/Call ratio spiked 42% above 30-day average • Unusual block trades detected in November $540 calls • Volume divergence pattern matching previous breakout setups

When these three signals align, SPY has moved an average of 3.8% within 10 trading days (backtested over 5 years of data)

The full analysis breaks down:

* Exact strike prices seeing smart money accumulation
* Historical win rate of this specific signal combination
* Key support/resistance levels for next week
* How this aligns with upcoming CPI and retail sales data

This isn't just another alert - it's the same model that correctly predicted the July rally and September pullback.
